title: tribulus mollis
intro: Tribulus mollis, also known as soft tribulus or desert horse-shoe, is a small shrub-like plant native to Australia, with tiny, yellowish-green flowers. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to reduce blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of arthritis. The health benefits of Tribulus mollis include improved kidney function, reduced uric acid levels, and increased urinary flow, making it a valuable remedy for treating urinary tract issues and kidney stones. Tribulus mollis can be prepared into various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas, allowing for convenient consumption and application of its medicinal properties.
